tweets.text: Apparently I have every Tufte book with the exception of "Envisioning Information" now. I'm very proud of my personal library.
Grandpa just handed me Tufte's 'The Visual Display of Quantitative Information'. I love him. This is awesome.
I need a get-rich-quick scheme worth $240. Ideas?
I think I'm breaking my own rule of over-updating and replying too much. But I always try to make my replies stand on their own as tweets.
@gregoryng I think that the amount of to follow really depends on their Twitter style- I don't like to follow reply a lot, so I follow more.
@kramerben Welcome to Twitter!
Photoset: gasoline-station: 30 Cities From 200 Years Ago…And Where They Are Now by NYU Stern Urbanization... http://t.co/2hCbbVD0Zm
@amandarie A tweet cloud? Whatsat?
From the script I'm working on-- $tree[$last_id]['next_id'] = $tree[$value]['next_id']; $tree[$value]['next_id'] = $first_id; -- Oh. Okay.
Listening to Fresh Air- I should probably watch Mary Poppins again.
@bayreporta No I didn't, but that is super awesome. Stay in touch!
Just almost-choked on my own saliva because I lack the mental capability of a 1-year-old.
Just had some pretty good lunch and talked about the web and new media- it's funny to hear/think about these things offline or off-twitter.
Okay. So. This script is the craziest piece of crap I've ever happened to run into. Just take a look and cry with me.  http://is.gd/502
Oh, hey Firefox 3. Could you maybe not remove everything from my bookmarks bar on restarting? Thanks.
I was just handed a CD of fonts. Cool.
Apple teasing me with it's emails about a new iPhone SDK and OS.
Oh. Cool. One of my tweets disappeared into the tubes.
Every day that I use the new apple keyboard (thin aluminum one) I fall more in love with it. Might be my next purchase after an iPhone.
Could I have some tabs in gmail? Thanks.
If I just switch out "ripped off" to "honored" in every TechCrunch blog post I read, the internet world seems a better place. I like it.
@enjalot That sounds amazing.
I am most certainly in love with this: http://t.co/whDifmcEZS
RT @DataPointed: Wish #D3js supported multiple simultaneous transitions on an element, so I could make things twizzle while they plonk.

I love bagels. I love macbooks. I love Law & Order.
I love how when you see one thing and inventory it in your head, you see it everywhere and get insight on the original thing.
Just saw a transparent fridge on CSI, which I want. All I could find was http://is.gd/58V which mentions a drawered fridge (as seen on +KN).
Just saw two ads talking about combatting climate change in a row from unrelated companies. This is progress.
Sitting around watching the food channel and missing the family. I'm 40 tweets away from the 2,000 mark.
It is a truly beautiful day.
the resident @vocativ punmaster general never disappoints http://t.co/utb8wcydQB
workingworkingworkingworking
My hat arrived in the mail. Woot.
Just split a 12-pack of Coke with josh. Over the course of like. 16 hours.
